examples: They were agate gray and they looked too big for his face because they had black lashes all round them.
And a water agate, called water bile agate.
It is round, like the size of a small yellow agate.
Agate is aware that people may view the book and its publication schedule in a distasteful light.
When Jobs resigned as Chief Executive of Apple, the publisher, Agate Publishing, moved publication up to Nov. 15, 2011.
